register.address_desc: Hoku ʻapi, ʻofisi, kolo — taʻetotongi mo vave ki he tokotaha kotoa
register.poi_desc: Ngaahi fakaʻilonga, tūʻunga pasi, maketi — mo e ngaahi imisi (ko e toe vakai ʻa e pule ʻoku fiemaʻu)
register.hotel_desc: Ngaahi hōtele, fale talitali, ngaahi risōti — ki he kau maʻu pisinisi (toe vakai makehe)
register.photo_tap: Tā ke tānaki atu ha ngaahi imisi
register.photo_guide: 1+ taki taha: tuʻa, lopi, loki, loki kaukau, ngaahi meʻa faingofua
register.address_notice: Lēsisita vave · Fekumi ʻi māmani kotoa
register.poi_notice: Pulusi hili ʻa e toe vakai ʻa e pule (ʻaho 1–3)

register.hotel_pricing_1: Angamaheni: $99/taʻu — Lisi fekumi + tuʻasila WIA Pin Code
register.hotel_pricing_2: Maʻolunga: $299/taʻu — Lisi muʻomuʻa + peesi fakaikiiki + tohi

register.hotel_pricing_note: Fakamatala totongi ʻoku ʻoatu hili ʻa e toe vakai fakangofua

ai_modal.title: WPC AI Assistant
ai_modal.question: Fehu'i
ai_modal.input_placeholder: Tukunga ki he coordinates (masani: 37.5665, 126.9780) pe fehu'i...
ai_modal.location_tip: Fakatokotoko 'a e code ni ke mahalo 'a e nofo i 'etau fonua!
ai_modal.location_denied: Ko e mahalo 'a e nofo kuo si'i. Tuku e nofonofo ki he fehu'i.
ai_modal.location_unsupported: Ko e kupita kuo si'i e 'aonga 'a e nofo ta'u.
ai_modal.service_not_ready: Ko e AI service kuo si'i 'i he taimi ni.
ai_modal.distance_enter: Tukunga ki he Pin Codes e ua!
ai_modal.distance_tip: Mental math tip: First 3-digit difference × 200 ≈ distance (km)
ai_modal.city_prompt: Tukunga ki he kolo ni ke mahalo!
ai_modal.reverse_desc: Tukunga ki he 9-digit Pin Code ke fakahoko GPS!
ai_modal.help_try: Fakatotongi 'a e fehu'i ko e ni:
ai_modal.help_register: Ke mahalo 'a e AI, fakamo'oni 'a e API key!
ai_modal.tool_summarize:
Fakafaingofua'i ʻa e ngaahi meʻa ʻoku ʻi he peesi uepisaiti ko ʻeni ʻi ha sētesi ʻe 3-5:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_translate:
Liliu ʻa e ngaahi meʻa ʻi lalo ki he lea fakatonga:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_question: Fakahū mai ha ngaahi kōtineti GPS ke liliu ki he WIA Pin Code!
ai_modal.tool_keywords:
Toʻo mai ha ngaahi foʻilea mahuʻinga ʻe 10 mei he meʻa ʻi lalo pea fakamatala nounou taki taha:

{text}
ai_modal.tool_explain: Te lava ke u fakamatalaʻi ʻa e WIA Pin Code, ʻa e YUJIN Transform, mo e ngaahi fika mamaʻo. Fehuʻi mai kiate au!
ai_modal.tool_chat: Talanoa tauʻatāina! Fehuʻi mai kiate au fekauʻaki mo e WIA Pin Code.

sky_explorer.title: Sky Explorer
sky_explorer.subtitle: Fai ki he lalolagi pea faka'ali'i ho'o iloa
sky_explorer.game_modes_sub: 12 ngaahi fa'ahinga ke faka'ata 'a e lalolagi mai ho'o cockpit
sky_explorer.geoflight_desc: Fakafekau vave — faka'osi 'a e kolo, ngaahi fonua, ngaahi kapiteli, mo e ngaahi kontinent. Leaflet minimap + cockpit HUD + animation 'a e flight.
sky_explorer.city_intel_desc: Ako 'a e faka'osi 'a e kolo — ngaahi falemai, ngaahi embassies, ngaahi pa'anga, visa — pea faka'osi 'a e ngaahi potungaue.
sky_explorer.photo_master_desc: Faka'osi 'a e fo'i kolo mai Wikipedia — faka'osi 'a e kolo. Faka'aonga 'a e ngaahi faka'osi 'i he kotoa.
sky_explorer.space_explorer_desc: Fakafekau 'i he solar system. Ako 'a e ngaahi planet, ngaahi moon, mo e ngaahi phenomena cosmic.
sky_explorer.daily_challenge_desc: Kolo taha, 10 ngaahi potungaue. Faka'osi 'a e faka'osi fo'ou 'i he 'aho kotoa. Faka'osi 'a e ngaahi taumu'a!
sky_explorer.travel_challenge_desc: Faka'ata 'a e fa'ahinga hoteli 3. Fakakaukau 'a e ngaahi kolo mai 'a e ngaahi faka'ata hoteli, faka'ata 'a e tau, faka'ata 'a e nofoaga 'i he mapa.
sky_explorer.data_powered_sub: Kotoa 'a e ngaahi potungaue 'e faka'osi mai he data 'o e mo'ui
sky_explorer.come_back: Hiki mai 'i he 'aho fo'ou ki he faka'osi fo'ou!
sky_explorer.which_capital: Ko e kapiteli 'o {country} ko e hā?
sky_explorer.which_flag: Ko e fanga e 'o e fonua fe?
sky_explorer.live_sky_desc: Quiz on real flights in the air right now. Identify destinations, origins, aircraft types from live ADS-B data.
sky_explorer.live_ocean_desc: Quiz on real vessels sailing the seas right now. Identify destinations, vessel types, and oceans from live AIS data.
sky_explorer.intel_time_hint: How long to memorize intel data?
sky_explorer.no_scores: Tēnā 'ikai ha tāpuaki. Tākai 'a e fa'ahinga ke vahe 'a e ngaahi ta'anga!
sky_explorer.currency_master_desc: Fakakaukau 'a e 166 'o e kālasi 'o e lalolagi mo e tau faka'ali'i 'i he taimi tonu.
sky_explorer.currency_symbol: Ko e hā 'a e kālasi e fa'aa'anga 'o e simbol?
sky_explorer.rate_compare: Ko e hā e tau 'e toe 'i he?
sky_explorer.country_from_currency: Ko e hā 'a e fonua e fa'aa'anga 'o e kālasi?
sky_explorer.landmark_master_desc: Fakakaukau 'a e ngaahi tū'ā ma'ae 10,000+ ngaahi nofoaga 'i he lalolagi.
sky_explorer.landmark_in: Ko e hā 'a e tū'ā ko 'eni?
sky_explorer.landmark_type_q: Ko e hā 'a e fa'ahinga tū'ā?
sky_explorer.landmark_country: Ko e hā 'a e fonua 'i he tū'ā ko 'eni?
sky_explorer.world_wonders_desc: Ngaahi maunga, ngaahi tunela 'i lalo 'o e tai, mo e ngaahi nofoaga 'a e pulu 'i he lalolagi.
sky_explorer.tunnel_connects: Ko e hā 'a e ngaahi fonua e faka'osi?
sky_explorer.balloon_where: Ko e hā 'a e nofoanga 'o e pulu ko 'eni?
sky_explorer.antipode_explorer_desc: Ko e hā 'i he tu'a 'o e lalolagi? Faka'ali'i 'a e geografia mo e matematika.
